{"id":"str-0ei","title":"Function classification into strata (axes: module, complexity, depth, kind)","description":"Implement function classification system that groups functions into strata along multiple axes:
- Module/directory: proportional representation from each directory subtree  
- Complexity tier: bucket by branch count (0-1, 2-5, 6-15, 16+)
- Dependency depth: sample from each call graph layer
- Function kind: pure, I/O, constructors, handlers if distinguishable

This is a foundational component used by both --core-sample and --stratum flags.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","owner":"33678+ketang@users.noreply.github.com","created_at":"2026-03-02T04:35:44Z","created_by":"Ketan Gangatirkar","updated_at":"2026-03-02T04:35:44Z"}
